notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily contains a retelling of the Ren Zu (人祖) legend being narrated by the Lingyuan Zhai太上大长老 to Zhao Lianyun. The events described (Ren Zu forcing the feather people, the conflict between freedom Gu and love Gu, etc.) are presented as a known story/parable being told, not as hidden/private knowledge. Zhao Lianyun's recognition by love Gu is an ordinary visible event in the chapter. No directly supported hidden knowledge, secret motives, or future-known information with clear source backing was found in the seed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed contains a mix of Ren Zu myth (人祖传) and real-world events (赵怜云, 爱情蛊). The only observable character action is 赵怜云 looking at 爱情蛊 on her shoulder (ptr_8) and her love for 马鸿运 (ptr_11). However, the observed behavior (looking at the Gu) is too minimal to infer a clear motive. The love for 马鸿运 is stated as fact but does not connect to a specific observed action in this chapter that would support a motive inference. No strong source-backed observedMotive can be constructed from the seed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed primarily contains a mythological story (人祖传) being told by 灵缘斋太上大长老 to 赵怜云. The only named collective actor is 灵缘斋 (Spiritual Affinity Hall), but the seed facts do not establish a concrete faction-level pressure or stake for 灵缘斋 as a collective. 赵怜云 is an individual disciple who received 爱情蛊 recognition, and 太上大长老 is an individual title-holder. No collective action, faction interest, resource competition, or territorial pressure is evident from the seed. The story of 人祖 and 羽民 is allegorical/mythological and does not represent current faction dynamics. No source-backed faction pressure can be derived.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
